def positive_flask_request_body_parsed_multiple_times():
    rule_id = "flask_request_body_parsed_multiple_times"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flask request handlers parse the same request body multiple times."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
